creator: graham@menhennitt.com.au
text:
Created attachment 163259
svn diff of patch

The attached patch updates the graphics/openimageio port to release 1.5.20.

This is necessary as a result of updating the graphics/libraw port to release 0.17.0 (see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=204553).
